questionHtml:
Which is an f-block element?

A. Sc

B. Sm

C. Sn

D. Sr

meta.title: Which is an f-block element? A. Sc B. Sm C. Sn D. Sr
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.1—The periodic table consists of periods, groups and blocks. Identify the positions of metals, metalloids and non-metals in the periodic table.
